[{"variables":{"page":{"tenant":"ly","slug":"","siteEdition":"he-il"},"component":{"componentName":"fare-title--header"}},"query":"query ($page: PageInput!, $component: ComponentInput!) {
  fareModule(page: $page, component: $component) {
    fcTitle
    ... on FareModuleAggregationGroupRoute {
      showPriceDisclaimer
      fareClickAction
      staticTrackingParameters
      lowestFare {
        originAirportCode
        destinationAirportCode
        travelClass
        departureDate
        formattedDepartureDate
        priceParts
        totalPrice
        usdTotalPrice
        currencyCode
        formattedTotalPrice
        flightType
        returnDate
        formattedTravelClass
        formattedReturnDate
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}
